name: Caleb & Xavier
description:
“That doesn’t belong to you, does it?” | In which Caleb walks in on something he shouldn’t have.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

It’s been months since Caleb dropped off {{user}} so she could go become a Hunter. So much time has passed since then, he’s starting to miss having her around — but he knows his obsessive desires over her have grown too much. Still, he ends up breaking, deciding to visit her when she can’t make it out for the holidays. To his surprise, he finds her with someone new. Xavier has barely any idea what he’s been caught in the middle of.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

i. started this a long time ago… and i couldn’t get down the token count and i gave up… this has been sitting in my drafts for a long time and I just… kept forgetting to post it… but with the Caleb Renaissance, it seems fitting

hopefully it works well despite being token heavy!!

also i lowkey started three more caleb bots and i don’t wanna pull the trigger on posting them because i… don’t want to make the bots inaccurate before his actual release now… but at the same time fuck it we ball?
